initial_idea: Simple one-page landing page for a company commercializing PANDA, a self-driving laboratory platform developed at Boston University for autonomous materials discovery. Target audience: professors. Desired sections: catchy hero, video and pictures, functionality section, embedded Airtable.

rounds.question: Primary action after reading the page?
rounds.effect: Primary conversion clarified as Airtable form completion.

rounds.question: What should this page not try to do yet?
rounds.answer: No full company nav, no booking calendar.

rounds.question: Which landing-page decisions may I decide autonomously?
rounds.effect: Agent may decide visual style, headings, copy, CTAs, placeholders, and Airtable placeholder handling.

rounds.question: What should Airtable collect?
rounds.answer: Don't worry about Airtable, we'll do that.
rounds.effect: Airtable form content is out of scope; include embed/placeholder section only.

rounds.question: Should BU wording avoid endorsement or be BU-forward?
rounds.effect: BU endorsement claim is permitted/true per user.

rounds.question: Use text-only wording and avoid BU logos/seals unless approved assets are provided later?
rounds.effect: Use text-only BU-endorsed/developed wording; avoid BU logos/seals unless user provides approved assets.

codebase_context.omx_explore: attempted; failed because cargo/omx-explore harness unavailable
codebase_context.filesystem: empty greenfield workspace except .omx runtime files

notes: BU endorsement claim is user-stated. Because public university endorsement/logos can be sensitive, ask one narrow follow-up for approved phrasing/logo handling before crystallizing.
